query: CRT television static screen flicker old TV monitor
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / analog_degradation: CRT television static and old TV monitors

response.objective_caption: A hand gripping a black remote control with visible buttons, aimed at a television displaying bright static. The television has a rounded CRT screen with dark casing. The hand's thumb presses a button near the center of the remote. The room behind the television is indistinct and dark.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A hand gripping a remote control, rendered in soft blur with heavy film grain, aimed at a CRT television flooded with harsh white static. The black-and-white palette is washed out and muted, with crushed dark shadows swallowing the room's details while the screen burns overexposed, evoking analog decay and late-night isolation.
